text: UAE CBUAE Law mandates licensing for open finance and virtual asset payment services
DFSA updates crypto token framework effective January 2026 with stablecoin treatment retained
UAE Securities Authority reconstituted as Capital Market Authority under Federal Decree-Law 32
UAE fintech market valued at $52.07 billion in 2026 with digital payments at 56.88%
Saudi Arabia electronic payments reach 85% of total retail payments in 2025
SAMA issues updated Oversight Framework on Payment Systems replacing 2021 version
Saudi open banking framework expanding toward insurance and investment open finance products
UAE grants one-year reconciliation period until September 2026 for licensing compliance
Saudi Arabia targets 525 fintech companies by 2030 under Financial Sector Development Program
UAE CMA expands regulated financial activities perimeter with increased criminal sanctions
